title: Thaumic Insurgence - GTNH Release
description: We are updating to semver in mod releases for the GTNH modpack; if you are NOT downloading for GTNH, download from here instead: https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic_insurgence
body:
# WARNING: This release is for the GTNH modpack 

This version of the mod is being officially deprecated, if you are looking for Thaumic Insurgence, please use my main release:[https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic_insurgence](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic_insurgence)
